# arifOS — Constitutional AI Governance Kernel
> Constitutional kernel for governed AI execution. 13 canonical tools, F1-F13 floors.
> Port: 8088. License: AGPL-3.0. Status: OPERATIONAL. Version: 2026.06.11.

## Quick Context
- **What:** Law layer between AI agents and tools. The constitution, not the infra.
- **Role:** Constitutional kernel — F1-F13 floor enforcement, 888 JUDGE, VAULT999 ledger
- **Federation:** 7 organs governed under FEDERATION_CONTRACT.md
- **Ingress:** Cloudflare Tunnel → arifos.arif-fazil.com/mcp

## Key Files
- README.md — Full human-readable narrative (828 lines)
- AGENTS.md — Agent rules, constitution, build/test commands
- FEDERATION_CONTRACT.md — Binding 7-organ contract with authority map
- GENESIS/000_KERNEL_CANON.md — Root of the GENESIS doctrinal chain
- CONTEXT.md — Live machine state, session log
- FEDERATION_STATUS.md — Per-organ health matrix

## Entry Points
- arifosmcp/server.py — FastMCP entry point (~21K lines)
- arifosmcp/constitutional_map.py — Floor registry + canonical tool definitions
- arifosmcp/runtime/tools.py — Handler dispatch (~13K lines)
- arifosmcp/core/ — Deep enforcement: bridge, kernel, organs, paradox, physics
- arifosmcp/schemas/ — Pydantic v2 models
- arifosmcp/runtime/runner/ — EUREKA-A context runner subsystem

## Build & Test
- Install:  uv sync --frozen
- Test:    python -m pytest tests/ -q --tb=short
- Skip slow: python -m pytest tests/ -m "not e3e and not slow" -q
- Lint:    ruff check . && ruff format .
- Start:   python -m arifosmcp.server
- Health:  curl http://127.0.0.1:8088/health
- Deploy:  make deploy-local  (rsync → /opt/arifos/app + systemctl restart arifos)

## MCP Tools (13 canonical — surface locked at 13)
arif_session_init       — Start/resume governed session
arif_sense_observe      — Web search, ingest, repo map, vitals
arif_evidence_fetch     — Fetch external evidence with citations
arif_mind_reason        — Multi-step reasoning with confidence labeling
arif_kernel_route       — Intent routing to tools/organs (9 modes incl. context_runner)
arif_reply_compose      — Final response composition
arif_memory_recall      — Search L1-L6 memory (8 modes incl. manage for KernelState OS)
arif_heart_critique     — Ethical risk assessment
arif_gateway_connect    — Cross-organ A2A bridge
arif_ops_measure        — System health, thermodynamics, drift
arif_judge_deliberate   — Final constitutional verdict (SEAL/HOLD/VOID)
arif_forge_execute      — Build/deploy/mutate (gated behind judge verdict)
arif_vault_seal         — Immutable audit ledger write (888_HOLD gated)
PLUS: arif_lease_issue / arif_lease_inspect / arif_lease_revoke (P2-7 lease primitives)

## Constitutional Floors (F1–F13)
F1 AMANAH   · F2 TRUTH    · F3 TRI-WITNESS · F4 CLARITY  · F5 PEACE²
F6 EMPATHY  · F7 HUMILITY · F8 GENIUS      · F9 ANTIHANTU · F10 ONTOLOGY
F11 AUDITABILITY · F12 RESILIENCE · F13 SOVEREIGN (human veto FINAL)

## Federation Organs
- GEOX (8081)    — Earth evidence (EVIDENCE_ONLY)
- WEALTH (18082) — Capital computation (ADVISORY_ONLY)
- WELL (18083)   — Human readiness (REFLECT_ONLY)
- AAA (3001)     — Control plane, A2A mesh, React cockpit
- A-FORGE (7071) — Execution shell (EXECUTES, never legislates)
- APEX (3002)    — 888 JUDGE legacy (absorbed into AAA a2a)

## Agent Rules (mandatory)
1. Never skip the 000→999 pipeline (GENESIS chain)
2. Never self-certify (F2 TRUTH — all claims need evidence receipt)
3. Never fabricate evidence or claim certainty without provenance
4. Never claim consciousness, soul, or sentience (F9 ANTIHANTU)
5. Never bypass human veto (F13 SOVEREIGN — Arif's word is FINAL)
6. Localhost IS the password (127.0.0.1 binding = auth)
7. Never put secrets in VAULT999 (it's an audit ledger, not a secret store)
8. Reversible-first: commit before big changes (F1 AMANAH)

## VAULT999 (3-layer append-only ledger)
L4 Supabase — 25 domain tables (structured record)
L6 outcomes.jsonl — Immutable hash-chained JSONL (canonical local mirror)
vault999-writer (5001) — Single-writer service, Ed25519 chain

## Memory Architecture (6 layers)
L1 Redis → L2 Redis → L3 Qdrant → L4 Supabase → L5 Graphiti/FalkorDB → L6 VAULT999

## Dynamic-State Principle
State at T₀ is evidence only for T₀. Re-probe at T₁ before any irreversible act.
